name: Vegetarian Pasta Shells
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook pasta shells in boiling water for 15 minutes.
2. Rinse under cold water and set aside.
3. Dice mushrooms, onions, zucchini, and peppers.
4. Sauté them in olive oil.
5. Season with 1 teaspoon ground nutmeg and 1 tablespoon grated parmesan.
6. Cool and stir in the defrosted chopped spinach and one beaten egg to bind it.
7. Blend in 6 tablespoons ricotta.
8. Stuff into the shells.
9. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
10. In a large casserole dish, arrange shells on a bed of spicy tomato sauce.
11. Bake for 15 minutes.
12. Remove top with shredded mozzarella cheese and bake 5 more minutes.
Options: You can use 1 pound (14 pieces) manicotti instead of shells. If you can only get jumbo shells (34 to a pound), fill with about 1 tablespoon per shell.
